text: This is an image of a worker in a restaurant.
a lady laying down is being fanned by a little girl
A bicycle locked on a rail by the beach.
Two cats are lying in the seat of a chair.
two people sitting next to each other wearing hat with one person wearing a shawl and a catchers mitt
A cactus attached to a fence that over looks a store.
A group of giraffes are standing next to a tree behind a fence.
A large clock hanging from the side of a brick building.
A living room with an artificial fire place.
Two girls facing each other and using their phones.
